caption: A man wearing a dark shirt and a headset is seen in a small video overlay in the bottom-left corner of a video game screen. In the first frame, the game shows a player card for "EMMANUEL OGBOH" with a rating of "80" and "LE" designation, set against a purple background with the text "ULTIMATE T" partially visible. The man in the overlay is smiling and waving. In the second frame, the game screen transitions to a bright green, glowing light effect. The third frame shows a black and silver pack with a large "UT" logo on a dark red background, with the text "SMALL PRESENT" in the top-left and "YOU HAVE 18 NEW NOTIFICATIONS" at the bottom. In the final frame, the pack opens to reveal another "80" rated player card for "CHASE" in a trophy-filled room, while the man in the overlay continues to watch.
